title: Legends Of Slugterra
body:
![Legends Of Slugterra Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e91c97525e1810ad7e9892d1e695cf43a974df_0.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M8M1V9VBOlw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KPUaQqQ-mMA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/A6nl9OLPIac" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![What is this about?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d83f99e79f8972ab0d7f3de07e54925b50db0342.png)

♦ This is a project from the team **Blitz Crew**, that aims to integrate the world of slugterra into Minecraft.

♦ **Legends of Slugterra** is a mod where you'll travel to the great world of Slugterra, where you will find 45+ slugs that all have different uses and personalities; befriend them and prepare to battle with your friends in intense, strategic battles; find many new biomes to explore, tons of new blocks for builders, and plenty of new features to check out.

♦ This project has been long awaited by our discord community and we would like to thank all of those that have been supporting us until now. We hope this brings you as much joy as possible and you continue to follow as the mod gets bigger and better. Now get out there and sling!


![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213480f1100b5c433529ea3e80c33122dfdc90a9.png)

♦ **Photon** (for VFX)

♦ **Geckolib** (for Animated Blocks, Entities, etc)

 



![About Bugs/Ideas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b870b1c84934410162aa49576676dbca1ee26aa0.png)

♦ If you have any bugs to report, or any ideas to suggest, feel free to send them in our **discord** below

♦ https://discord.gg/BHaGtgMYHm

♦ We will get to them when we can.
